name: Rubber Wheel Chock
shortDescription: Solid rubber wheel chock for parked truck and trailer wheel restraint.
longDescription: A solid rubber wedge chock placed against a parked truck or trailer wheel to prevent roll-away during loading and unloading — a mandatory control at most loading docks. Supplied in a large and a compact size to suit different wheel diameters.

images.alt: Rubber Wheel Chock supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
